# BP-163 positive: the golden update path writes without a short-test guard.
lang: go
file: BP-163-vulnerable_test.go
variant: update-without-short
---
package snapshots

import (
	"flag"
	"os"
	"testing"
)

var update = flag.Bool("update", false, "rewrite golden files")

func TestGolden(t *testing.T) {
	if *update {
		if err := os.WriteFile("testdata/golden.json", []byte(`{}`), 0o644); err != nil {
			t.Fatal(err)
		}
	}
}
